label: External-canon → repo identity crosswalk (config-as-data; DKR §2). Reconciles FS / Dispatch-Auric V1 release-package identifiers to the repo's LIVE canonical identifiers. IDENTITY only — never authority. Propose-only; a human-confirmed alias is sticky. Closed-graph validated (core/registry/canon.ts).

aliases.note: FS-8000 public_source_catalog SRC-NCUA-CALL is the NCUA 5300 call report source the repo already ingests.
FS-8000 SRC-FDIC-BANKFIND == the repo FDIC BankFind connector source (Sprint III Wave 3).
FS-8000 SRC-SEC-EDGAR == the repo SEC EDGAR connector source (Sprint III Wave 2).
FS-5100 object_registry OBJ.CREDITUNION == the repo credit-union entity class (Volume XI ontology).

PENDING HUMAN REVIEW — FS OBJ.INSTITUTION is broader than the repo's financial_institution (could also cover credit_union). Left proposed to demonstrate identity-not-authority: the label match is a proposal, not a semantic merge.
FS-8000 CFPB regulations source == the repo CFPB regulations connector source. Confirmed + liveness-checked (Wave 5 crosswalk growth).
FS-8000 FDIC failed-banks source == the repo fdic_failed_banks connector source. Confirmed + liveness-checked (Wave 5 crosswalk growth).

PENDING HUMAN REVIEW — FS-5100 workflow_registry pilot-evaluation workflow proposed against the cartridge workflow namespace. Doc-grade proposal: no live workflow registry yet, so identity is proposed, never confirmed. IDENTITY not AUTHORITY.
PENDING HUMAN REVIEW — FS-5100 workflow_registry vendor-diligence workflow. Proposed until the repo workflow registry is built (documentation-complete ≠ built).

PENDING HUMAN REVIEW — FS-5100 agent_registry profile-assembler proposed against core profile assembly. A name match is not a semantic merge; the agent contract must be tightened doc-grade → contract-grade before confirming.
PENDING HUMAN REVIEW — FS-5100 agent_registry IC-memo drafter. Agents may draft/recommend but never approve; the approval stays a human gate. Proposed.
PENDING HUMAN REVIEW — FS-5100 event_registry observation-ingested proposed against the kernel event bus. No live event-type registry yet; proposed.
PENDING HUMAN REVIEW — FS-5100 evidence_registry call-report filing. Evidence contracts stay stricter than entity-space; proposed, never auto-confirmed.
PENDING HUMAN REVIEW — FS-5100 approval_registry IC approval proposed against the live ICApproval human gate. Human-authority contract → propose-only until an approval registry exists.
PENDING HUMAN REVIEW — FS-5100 kpi_registry net-worth ratio proposed against the deterministic call-report ratio. Proposed until a KPI registry is built.
